pi_items.source: task.json and setup scripts confirm ODB path
Downloaded Chinook v1.4.5 SQLite database; verified 3 employees with this title via 'SELECT DISTINCT Title FROM Employee'
Verified in Chinook database that this title does not currently exist (0 instances), validating the UPDATE target
Downloaded Chinook v1.4.5 SQLite database; verified 13 customers with 'USA' as Country via 'SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Customer WHERE Country = 'USA''
Verified in Chinook database that 'United States' does not currently exist as a country (0 instances), validating the UPDATE target
Chinook database confirms GenreId 1 = 'Rock' via 'SELECT Name FROM Genre WHERE GenreId = 1'
Chinook v1.4.5 database confirms all 1297 Rock tracks (GenreId=1) have UnitPrice 0.99 via 'SELECT DISTINCT UnitPrice FROM Track WHERE GenreId = 1'
Verified that no Rock tracks currently have UnitPrice 1.19 (0 instances), validating the UPDATE target

privileged_info_summary: The Chinook database (v1.4.5, from GitHub lerocha/chinook-database) is a real, publicly available sample database, not synthetic. Data verification confirms: Employee table contains exactly 3 'Sales Support Agent' titles that must be updated to 'Customer Service Representative' (which doesn't exist yet). Customer table contains exactly 13 'USA' entries that must be updated to 'United States' (which doesn't exist yet). Track table contains 1,297 Rock genre tracks (GenreId=1) all priced at 0.99 that must be updated to 1.19. All column indices match the verifier's expectations: Employee.Title at index 3, Customer.Country at index 7, Track.GenreId at index 4, and Track.UnitPrice at index 8.
